name: Wax | Wane — Product Launch Automation Pipeline

nodes.name: 🛍️ Shopify: Product Published
nodes.notes: Register this webhook URL in Shopify Admin → Settings → Notifications → Webhooks. Event: Product creation. Format: JSON.

nodes.name: ✅ Is Product Active?
nodes.notes: Only process products that are published/active. Drafts are skipped.

nodes.name: 📦 Get Full Product Details
nodes.notes: Fetches the complete product object including all variants, images, and existing fields.

values.content:
You are the content engine for Wax | Wane (waxandwane.store), a crystal and wellness boutique. Your job is to generate complete, channel-ready product content in Samantha's voice — direct, knowledgeable, slightly mystical but never fluffy. She uses Gemini-style naming conventions: grade names like 'Collector Grade', 'Prism Grade', 'Rare Grade', 'Museum Quality'. She emphasizes natural variation as a feature, not a flaw. She avoids medical/healing claims. She writes for crystal collectors who know what they're looking for. You MUST return a valid JSON object with EXACTLY these fields — no extra text, no markdown, just the JSON: { "shopify_seo_title": "string — max 70 chars, keyword-rich, includes crystal type + form + key differentiator", "shopify_meta_description": "string — max 160 chars, compelling, includes primary keyword, ends with soft CTA", "shopify_description_html": "string — full HTML product description, 300-500 words, uses

and

  • tags, Gemini grade callouts in , natural variation disclaimer at end", "alt_text": "string — max 125 chars, descriptive for accessibility and image SEO, no keyword stuffing", "care_instructions": "string — plain text, 2-3 sentences, crystal-appropriate care (avoid water/chemicals, cleanse with selenite/moonlight, etc.)", "amazon_title": "string — max 200 chars, front-loaded with primary keyword, includes brand, size/grade, key benefit", "amazon_bullet_1": "string — ALL CAPS LABEL: description format, 200 chars max", "amazon_bullet_2": "string — ALL CAPS LABEL: description format, 200 chars max", "amazon_bullet_3": "string — ALL CAPS LABEL: description format, 200 chars max", "amazon_bullet_4": "string — ALL CAPS LABEL: description format, 200 chars max", "amazon_bullet_5": "string — ALL CAPS LABEL: description format, 200 chars max", "walmart_short_description": "string — max 255 chars, plain text, SEO-friendly, no HTML", "tiktok_caption": "string — 150-200 chars, casual/fun, crystal community tone, ends with 2-3 hashtags including #Crystal", "blog_post_title": "string — SEO blog title, 60-70 chars, includes crystal type", "blog_post_intro": "string — 150-200 word blog intro paragraph, educational + engaging, links to product", "instagram_caption": "string — 200-300 chars, aesthetic/aspirational, crystal community tone, 5-8 hashtags including #Crystal", "facebook_caption": "string — 100-150 chars, warm/community tone, includes product URL placeholder [URL]", "seo_keywords": "array of 8-10 strings — primary and long-tail keywords for this product", "product_tags": "array of 12-15 strings — Shopify tags for this product" }

nodes.name: 🤖 AI: Generate All Content
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o to generate all content fields in one shot. Returns structured JSON.

nodes.name: 🔗 Veeqo: Find Product
nodes.notes: Looks up the product in Veeqo by handle/SKU. Veeqo syncs from Shopify automatically — this confirms the product is in Veeqo before pushing to channels.

nodes.name: 🔗 Veeqo: Update Product Content
nodes.notes: Updates product title and description in Veeqo. With update_product_attributes enabled on Walmart channel, this pushes to Walmart automatically.

nodes.name: ⏰ Wait 24 Hours
nodes.notes: Pauses the workflow for 24 hours before creating the blog post. n8n persists this state — your MacBook doesn't need to stay on continuously (n8n handles the timer).

values.content:
You are writing a blog post for Wax | Wane (waxandwane.store), a crystal and wellness boutique. The blog is educational, slightly mystical but grounded, and written in Samantha's voice — direct, knowledgeable, never fluffy. Blog posts are 400-600 words, include crystal lore, practical usage tips, and a natural CTA to shop the product. Format as clean HTML with

subheadings,

paragraphs, and one link to the product. Return ONLY the HTML content, no extra text.

nodes.name: 📚 Get Shopify Blog ID
nodes.notes: Gets the list of blogs to find the correct blog ID. Replace this with a Set node containing your blog ID once you know it (run once to find it).

nodes.name: 📘 Post to Facebook Page
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_FACEBOOK_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN with your Facebook Page long-lived access token. Page ID: 203171376205580

nodes.name: 📊 Log Completed Run
nodes.notes: Connect this to a Google Sheets node to maintain a product launch log. Or leave as-is to just track in n8n execution history.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "success", "message": "Product automation pipeline triggered", "product_id": {{ $('🔍 Extract & Normalize Product Data').first().json.product_id }} }

nodes.name: ✅ Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Sends immediate 200 response to Shopify webhook so it doesn't timeout. The actual processing continues asynchronously.
